title: Building a Modern Bank
description: Talk at Manchester Digital's MD Fintech 26 on what it takes to build a modern bank — the engineering, architecture and culture choices behind LHV Bank's platform.

title: Leading Through the Noise: Making AI Stick in Engineering Teams
description: AI is evolving faster than engineering organisations can comfortably track, leaving leaders to cut through constant noise and hype. This talk focuses on how engineering leaders can drive real AI adoption through culture, experimentation and clear decision-making, turning rapid change into sustained team impact rather than fragmented tool use.

title: Nimble scaling: LHV Bank accelerates value flow and strategic alignment through Team Topologies
description: Hands-on workshops on restructuring engineering organisations for flow.

title: AI, Data & Automation: Redefining the Customer Experience
description: Session on how AI, data and automation are transforming customer experience in financial services, representing LHV Bank at Open Banking Expo 2025.

title: WealthTech Panel Discussion
description: WealthTech themed panel at the York FinTech Forum 2025 featuring Macs Dickinson (Director of Engineering, LHV Bank), discussing innovation, opportunities and challenges in WealthTech with sector leaders.

title: Scaling Panel Discussion
description: Panel on scaling FinTechs featuring Macs Dickinson (Director of Engineering, LHV Bank) alongside industry leaders, chaired by Julia Streets at the FinTech North Leeds Conference. Panel explored scaling strategies and growth challenges in UK fintech.

title: People as Catalyst and Obstacle to Change
description: Panel discussion on how people can be both the catalyst and the biggest obstacle to enacting organisational change.

title: Leading with Cognitive Empathy
description: Talk on how cognitive empathy — using our own experiences to understand others — can help leaders build a better workplace, followed by a panel discussion with Stephanie B. and Lour Nader.

title: Demystifying Neurodiversity for Engineering Leaders
venue: WRK Digital Meetup, xDesign HQ Leeds
description: Software Engineering Leadership meetup co-hosted with Lindsay Baker, exploring neurodiversity in the workplace and what engineering leaders need to understand.

title: Build, Buy or Outsource? The Software Dilemma
venue: Fruition Consulting & Enablis, Brew Society Leeds
description: Panel with Cassy Calvert, Rebecca Fitzgerald, Paul Durkan and Ngaire Guzzetti debating the build vs buy vs outsource question for software delivery leaders.

title: React Context API – Do You Really Need Redux?
description: TechEdge talk by Macs Dickinson on the React Context API and exploring whether Redux is necessary for state management in React apps.

title: React for .NET Developers
description: Talk introducing React to .NET developers, explaining how React's approach to data flow and interactive client-side UI can benefit ASP.NET applications, based on your session at DDD North 2015.
